# Kevin Joseph — Frontend Engineer

## Skills
- Angular: 5 years
- React: 3 years
- TypeScript: 5 years
- NgRx / Redux: 4 years
- RxJS: 4 years
- CSS / SCSS: 6 years

## Tools
Git / GitHub, CI/CD Pipelines, Storybook, Figma, Jest / Cypress, Webpack / Vite

## Experience
2020 — Present: Application Engineer at Banner Life
  Promoted within the digital transformation program. Built a back office workbench used by underwriters, case managers, and auditors to process applications. Also developed a telephone interviewer tool enabling agents to walk customers through applications over the phone — all using Angular, TypeScript, and NgRx.

2018 — 2020: Associate Application Engineer at Banner Life
  Joined a digital transformation initiative to replace a paper-based application process. Built an online application journey using Angular, HTML, CSS, TypeScript, and NgRx.

2017 — 2018: Backend Developer at Zoho Corporation
  Contributed to database design and backend development for Zoho Contracts, working within a large-scale SaaS product environment.

## Projects
### Enterprise Dashboard (Angular / NgRx)
Architected a complex state management layer for a large-scale enterprise app — real-time data visualization, role-based access control, and a modular plugin system.
Tags: Angular, NgRx, RxJS, D3.js

### Design System (Component Library)
Built a comprehensive, accessible component library from tokens to composable patterns — adopted across multiple product teams and documented in Storybook.
Tags: TypeScript, Storybook, SCSS, A11y

### AI Workflow Tool (React / Node.js)
An intelligent task automation platform with a drag-and-drop workflow builder, LLM-powered suggestions, and real-time multi-user collaboration.
Tags: React, Node.js, OpenAI, WebSockets

### E-Commerce Platform (Full Stack)
High-performance storefront with SSR, optimistic UI, and seamless payment integration — handling 10K+ daily transactions with sub-200ms response times.
Tags: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Redis
